title: 9 Herbal Teas For Tickling Throat
description: Achillea millefolium teas contains compounds that help soothe and calm an irritated throat. The tea's active ingredients, such as flavonoids and terpenoids, have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which may help reduce swelling and combat infections in the throat. This can make it easier for the body to fight off underlying causes of a tickling throat, such as a cold or allergies.
